info.title: datask-excel
info.description: CLI tool to export the database table and column deatils in Excel..

commands.name: excel
commands.description: Commands to create, validate and update Excel files from a database.

commands.name: create
commands.description:
Creates an Excel workbook from the schema of a database.
details    <No description provided>

options.name: --include
options.description: Tables to include in generation; should match the format <schema>.<table>. Use regular express syntax.

options.name: --exclude
options.description: Tables to exclude in generation; should match the format <schema>.<table>. Use regular express syntax.

options.name: --populate
options.description: Populates the Excel workbook with data from the database.

options.name: --force
options.description: Overwrites the output file, if it already exists.

commands.name: validate
commands.description: Validates an Excel workbook against a database

options.name: --fix
options.description: Start an interactive session to fix validation issues.

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Commands related to generating output from the Excel files.

commands.name: scripts
commands.description: Generates SQL INSERT scripts from the Excel workbook.

arguments.name: OUTPUT
arguments.description: The path to the scripts file to create.

commands.name: populate
commands.description: Populates an empty database with data from an Excel workbook.

options.name: --validate
options.description: Validates the Excel workbook against the database schema before attempting to populate.
